title: cattleya × braunae
intro: Cattleya × braunae, also known as the Brazilian Orchid, is a hybrid species of orchid, resulting from the cross between Cattleya gaskelliana and Cattleya warscewiczii. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cattleya × braunae include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, the plant's extracts are often used to make infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
